rationale: The ensures is `A ==> det_pop_unique_equal`; the previous attempt failed because it asserted facts about r1/r2/post*_self_ unconditionally, but A is the antecedent of the implication and is not in scope at the top of the body. We wrap the derivation in `if (A) { ... }` so every assert is sound under A, then derive r1==r2, post1_self_@ == post2_self_@, the length equality, and pointwise view equality — the maximal set of consequences the spec actually forces.
